proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (age_years) is associated with lower probability of objective_response in AML patients.
Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with a different objective_response rate compared to male patients.
Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with lower probability of objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Logistic regression of response on age_years: beta=0.0004, p=0.7183
Response rate female 0.171 vs male 0.168; chi2 p=0.3204; rate diff=0.0033
Logistic regression of response on ECOG: beta=-0.3837, p=1.842e-97

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with npm1_mutation=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with flt3_itd=1 have a different objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with idh1_mutation=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with idh2_mutation=1 have a different objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with complex_karyotype=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.

analyses.result_summary: npm1_mutation: response 0.173 (n=15014) vs 0.167 (n=34986); rate diff=0.0059, p=0.1063
idh1_mutation: response 0.221 (n=3624) vs 0.165 (n=46376); rate diff=0.0563, p=2.872e-18
idh2_mutation: response 0.165 (n=4679) vs 0.169 (n=45321); rate diff=-0.0040, p=0.4877
tp53_mutation: response 0.166 (n=4985) vs 0.169 (n=45015); rate diff=-0.0037, p=0.5069
complex_karyotype: response 0.168 (n=7462) vs 0.169 (n=42538); rate diff=-0.0012, p=0.8049

proposed_hypotheses.text: Receipt of treatment_midostaurin is associated with a higher objective_response rate vs not receiving it.
Receipt of treatment_gilteritinib is associated with a higher objective_response rate vs not receiving it.
Receipt of treatment_ivosidenib is associated with a higher objective_response rate vs not receiving it.
Receipt of treatment_enasidenib is associated with a higher objective_response rate vs not receiving it.
Receipt of treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is associated with a higher objective_response rate vs not receiving it.
Receipt of treatment_7plus3 is associated with a higher objective_response rate vs not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: treatment_midostaurin: response on 0.169 (n=7545) vs off 0.169; diff=-0.0005, p=0.9096
treatment_gilteritinib: response on 0.163 (n=7545) vs off 0.170; diff=-0.0071, p=0.1301
treatment_ivosidenib: response on 0.171 (n=3938) vs off 0.169; diff=0.0020, p=0.7457
treatment_enasidenib: response on 0.161 (n=3972) vs off 0.170; diff=-0.0086, p=0.1655
treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine: response on 0.173 (n=20020) vs off 0.166; diff=0.0074, p=0.03054
treatment_7plus3: response on 0.170 (n=22580) vs off 0.168; diff=0.0021, p=0.5318

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_midostaurin × flt3_itd interaction: midostaurin improves objective_response more in flt3_itd=1 patients than in flt3_itd=0 patients.
treatment_gilteritinib × flt3_itd interaction: gilteritinib improves objective_response more in flt3_itd=1 patients than in flt3_itd=0 patients.
treatment_ivosidenib × idh1_mutation interaction: ivosidenib improves objective_response more in idh1_mutation=1 patients than in idh1_mutation=0 patients.
treatment_enasidenib × idh2_mutation interaction: enasidenib improves objective_response more in idh2_mutation=1 patients than in idh2_mutation=0 patients.
Higher wbc_k_per_ul is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher blast_pct_marrow is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher probability of objective_response.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher probability of objective_response.
Higher platelets_k_ul is associated with higher probability of objective_response.
Within flt3_itd=1 patients, treatment_midostaurin is associated with higher objective_response than no midostaurin.
Within flt3_itd=1 patients, treatment_gilteritinib is associated with higher objective_response than no gilteritinib.
Within idh1_mutation=1 patients, treatment_ivosidenib is associated with higher objective_response than no ivosidenib.
Within idh2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_enasidenib is associated with higher objective_response than no enasidenib.

proposed_hypotheses.text: treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine × unfit_for_intensive interaction: ven/aza improves objective_response more in unfit_for_intensive=1 patients than in unfit_for_intensive=0 patients.
treatment_7plus3 × unfit_for_intensive interaction: 7+3 improves objective_response more in unfit_for_intensive=0 patients than in unfit_for_intensive=1 patients.
Within unfit_for_intensive=1 patients, treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine is associated with higher objective_response.
Within unfit_for_intensive=0 patients, treatment_7plus3 is associated with higher objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: unfit subset: ven/aza+ 0.179 vs ven/aza- 0.163; diff=0.0162, p=0.002727

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both tp53_mutation=1 AND complex_karyotype=1 have a lower objective_response rate than other patients.
treatment_7plus3 × tp53_mutation interaction: 7+3 effect on objective_response differs by tp53_mutation status.
treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine × tp53_mutation interaction: ven/aza effect differs by tp53_mutation status.

analyses.code: chi2 of (tp53 AND complex_karyotype) flag vs response

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with npm1_mutation=1 AND flt3_itd=0 (favorable) have higher objective_response than other patients.
treatment_7plus3 × npm1_mutation interaction: 7+3 benefit (vs no 7+3) is greater in npm1_mutation=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: npm1+/flt3itd-: rate 0.172 (n=12035) vs others 0.168; diff=0.0041, p=0.2939

Objective_response rates differ across insurance_type categories (medicare, medicaid, private, uninsured).
Patients with rural_residence=1 have a different objective_response rate than urban patients.

After adjusting for ECOG, blast %, albumin, LDH, NPM1, FLT3-ITD, and TP53, age_years remains independently associated with objective_response.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with secondary_aml=1 have lower objective_response than de novo AML patients.
treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine × secondary_aml interaction: ven/aza effect differs in secondary AML.

analyses.result_summary: secondary 0.169 vs de novo 0.169; diff=-0.0005, p=0.9038

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher ast_u_l is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher alt_u_l is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
age_years × treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine interaction: ven/aza relative effect on objective_response increases with age.
age_years × treatment_7plus3 interaction: 7+3 relative effect on objective_response decreases with age.
ecog_ps × treatment_7plus3 interaction: 7+3 effect on objective_response decreases with ECOG.
Higher anc_k_ul is associated with higher probability of objective_response.
Higher alc_k_ul is associated with higher probability of objective_response.
platelets_k_ul × treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine: at higher platelets, ven/aza objective_response benefit changes.
Higher years_since_diagnosis is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with lower probability of objective_response.
Within idh1_mutation=1 AND unfit_for_intensive=1 patients, treatment_ivosidenib is associated with higher objective_response than no ivosidenib.
Within idh2_mutation=1 AND unfit_for_intensive=1 patients, treatment_enasidenib is associated with higher objective_response than no enasidenib.
After adjusting for treatment_ivosidenib and standard covariates, idh1_mutation remains positively associated with objective_response.

chi2 of enasidenib in idh2_mutation=1 & unfit=1
smf.logit('objective_response ~ idh1_mutation + treatment_ivosidenib + age_years + ecog_ps + albumin_g_dl + tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + npm1_mutation + flt3_itd', df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving both treatment_7plus3=1 AND treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1 differ in objective_response from those receiving exactly one.
treatment_midostaurin × npm1_mutation interaction: midostaurin effect differs by npm1 status.

analyses.result_summary: both rate 0.173 (n=9080) vs single 0.171; diff=0.0028, p=0.5443

proposed_hypotheses.text: pain_nrs × treatment_7plus3 interaction: 7+3 effect on response decreases with pain_nrs.
diabetes_mellitus × treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine interaction: ven/aza effect differs in diabetics.
heart_failure × treatment_7plus3 interaction: 7+3 effect on response is reduced in heart_failure=1 patients.

In a multivariable logistic model including age, ECOG, albumin, LDH, blast %, NPM1, FLT3-ITD, IDH1, TP53, complex karyotype, and unfit-for-intensive, multiple variables remain independently and significantly associated with objective_response.
After full multivariable adjustment, idh1_mutation remains positively and significantly associated with objective_response.
After full multivariable adjustment, albumin_g_dl remains positively and significantly associated with objective_response.
After full multivariable adjustment, age_years remains negatively associated with objective_response.
